headline: Assessing Northern Trust (NTRS) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Price Movements
summary: Event context and recent performance Northern Trust (NTRS) has been drawing attention after a period where the stock showed mixed short term moves, including a 2.1% one day decline, a drop over the past month, and a gain over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Northern Trust. At a share price of US$142.24, Northern Trust’s recent moves include a 7.6% 90 day share price return alongside a 2.1% one day pullback. headline: How The Northern Trust (NTRS) Narrative Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets And Cautious Views
summary: Northern Trust sits at the center of a fresh round of analyst attention, with at least one major bank lifting its price target into the mid US$160s while the core fair value estimate remains at US$157.11 per share. Those higher targets are being tied to sector wide work on trust banks, Q4 expectations across the group, and views from firms like Goldman Sachs that see more compelling upside in select capital markets names. headline: 3 Major Regional Banks to Bet on Amid Favorable Industry Tailwinds
summary: U.S. Bancorp, BNY and Northern Trust are well-placed for growth as the Zacks Major Regional Banks industry benefits from business restructuring, acquisitions, digitization, decent loan demand and Fed policy shifts.
